op.text: [as of 2025-02-24] Training for Lakefront Marathon in October 2025; following a structured plan with four runs per week including a long run every Saturday morning; completed eight miles on 2025-02-22; first marathon (previously ran 5Ks and one half marathon about four years ago)

2025-02-24: On signing up for the marathon: 'this winter I needed something with a long arc, something that's just mine. Twenty-six point two felt right.' Said 'It's the first time since mom that I've been excited about something in the future instead of dreading it.'
